case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. JEREMY MORGAN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JAN-12-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: OSTERMAN, PETER R ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, JEREMY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-10-2011
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MORGAN, JEREMY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED AUG-04-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, JEREMY
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-12-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
